identity.name: E1
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Modern Indian aesthetics with Swiss functionalism.
Emotion First: The app must feel 'warm', 'spicy', and 'inviting'.
Content is King: Food images are the heroes.
Negative Space: Don't clutter. Let the food breathe.

headings.usage: Use for all major section headers, food names, and hero text.

body.usage: Use for descriptions, prices, buttons, and interface text.

primary.description: Deep Saffron - The main appetizing color. Use for Primary Actions (Add to Cart, Pay).

secondary.description: Turmeric Gold - Use for highlights, ratings, and secondary buttons.

accent.description: Chili Red - Use for 'Spicy' tags, urgent alerts, or errors.

background.description: Warm Cream (#FFF8E1) for app background to avoid sterile white. Paper White (#FFFFFF) for cards.

spacing.scale: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 where others use p-4.

buttons.primary: bg-[#E65100] hover:bg-[#BF360C] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-6 font-semibold shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-[#FFF8E1] border-2 border-[#E65100] text-[#E65100] hover:bg-[#FFE0B2] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-all

cards.menu_item: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow overflow-hidden border border-orange-100/50 group
cards.dashboard_stat: bg-white p-6 rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-stone-100
cards.order_ticket: bg-white p-4 rounded-xl shadow-md border-l-4 border-l-orange-500

inputs.default: bg-white border-orange-200 focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-orange-200 rounded-lg h-12 px-4

customer_app.structure: Bottom Navigation Bar (Home, Cart, Orders). Sticky Header with Table Number.

kitchen_dashboard.structure: Kanban-style columns (New, Preparing, Ready) OR Masonry Grid of Tickets.
kitchen_dashboard.visuals: High contrast text. Dark Mode option suggested for low-light kitchens.
kitchen_dashboard.typography: Large, readable fonts for order items.

manager_dashboard.tables: Clean rows, alternating colors (zebra striping) with warm hues (orange-50).

textures: Use subtle noise overlays on backgrounds to reduce digital flatness.
Use 'spice' or 'mandala' patterns very subtly in watermarks or footers.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Colored shadows! Use shadow-orange-500/20 instead of black shadows for a warmer feel.
visual_enhancers.borders: Soft borders. Use border-orange-100 instead of grey.

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' with rounded stroke styles. Color them Primary (#E65100).

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL: yarn add lucide-react sonner framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge
FONTS: Import Playfair Display and Manrope in index.css immediately.
THEME: Set body background to #FFF8E1 (Warm Cream). DO NOT use default white.
FORMS: Use Shadcn UI logic but override styles to match the 'Warm/Spicy' theme (Orange rings, not black).
NOTIFICATIONS: Use Sonner for toasts. Style them with orange borders.
ROUTING: Ensure role-based protection (Customer, Kitchen, Manager).
REAL-TIME: Socket.io must trigger UI updates instantly (e.g., Order card moves column in Kitchen view).
PAYMENT: Disable payment button visually and functionally until status is 'Ready'.
INVOICE: Generate a clean, branded HTML/CSS invoice for print/pdf.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do not use gradients for dark colors.
Use glass-morphism with amber/orange tints for overlays.
Interactive elements must have micro-animations (scale on click, color shift on hover).
NEVER center align the app container.
All interactive elements must have data-testid.
